title: Codonoboea leptocalyx
taxonomy: Codonoboea leptocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Codonoboea, which is a group of plants that are primarily native to the tropical regions of Asia. The family Gesneriaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes the African violet and the gloxinia. Codonoboea leptocalyx is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Gesneriaceae family. Further research is necessary to fully understand the classification and relationships of Codonoboea leptocalyx.
